rationale: Every sourceRef resolves to exactly one original claim, and each copy string is character-for-character identical to its original, preserving all numbers (14.2%, 10.8%, 31 staff-hours, 18,400, 138 dollars, 86,000 dollars, 91%) and source-critical wording. No copied claim introduces any new quantitative value, so the fact-check gate is satisfied with clear visible evidence and no hard-fail concerns.
